title: chloraea calantha
intro: Chloraea calantha, also known as the New Zealand orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family that is native to New Zealand and Australia. The medicinal properties of Chloraea calantha are derived from its tubers, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to reduce pain and fight off infections. Chloraea calantha can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
